creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Here is a update patch for japanese/tcl80 8.0.5jp1.6 -> 1.7
This patch fix NULL pointer free probrem at file operation.

Fix: Would you like to commit following patch to japanese/tcl80.
Thanks.
